name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-31
title: Contract spec.md monotonic invariant renumber + cross-reference audit (split from BACKLOG-30 F8)
description:
Why deferred: cross-reference blast radius needs focused audit + dedicated PR cycle. CONTRACT-BACKLOG-30 (PR landing alongside this filing) delivered F6 test consolidation, F7 moot stripping, the folded check_invariant_monotonic_order enforcement test (with KNOWN_ISSUES=['contract','rabbit-cage','rabbit-feature']), and tombstone migration to contract/CHANGELOG.md. The final piece is the renumber itself.

Scope:
- Renumber the surviving ~37 invariants in .claude/features/contract/docs/spec/spec.md monotonically (no decimal sub-numbers; no letter suffixes; document order matches numeric order).
- Update every cross-reference: grep the .claude/ tree for 'Inv N', 'per Inv N', 'Inv N/N', '(matches Inv N)', etc. Sites known to cite contract invariants by number include policy/spec.md, policy/test/, rabbit-cage/spec.md cross-references, and contract's own tests.
- Remove 'contract' from _MONOTONIC_KNOWN_ISSUES in .claude/features/contract/lib/checks.py once spec is monotonic.
- Pre-requisite: grep audit FIRST — generate a manifest of every cross-reference site (paths + line numbers + exact citation text) BEFORE touching spec.md. The manifest IS the work plan; without it, drift is silent.
- Cross-feature considerations: cage and rabbit-feature also still on _MONOTONIC_KNOWN_ISSUES until PRs #161 and #162 merge — those are independent prunes, not part of this work.

Acceptance:
- contract spec.md invariants in strictly monotonic document order (run check_invariant_monotonic_order against it and assert pass).
- _MONOTONIC_KNOWN_ISSUES list empty (or just the pending non-contract entries pending their PR merges).
- All cross-reference sites updated; no broken 'Inv N' citation in the .claude/ tree.
- contract/CHANGELOG.md carries a renumber note at the top describing the event (the old historical numbers in CHANGELOG entries are NOT renumbered per Inv 46).

history.note: Closed by PR #165: monotonic renumber 1..39 + cross-reference audit; _MONOTONIC_KNOWN_ISSUES now = ['rabbit-cage']
